nasb.text: “But you trusted in your beauty and played the harlot because of your fame, and you poured out your harlotries on every passer-by who might be willing.

esv.text: “But you trusted in your beauty and played the whore because of your renown and lavished your whorings on any passerby; your beauty became his.

cnv.text: “‘可是你倚仗你的美麗，又憑著你的名聲去行淫；你向每一個過路的人縱情淫亂。

ccb.text: “‘你却仗着自己的美貌和名声纵情淫乱，与所有过路的人苟合。
